{{Expand}}

{{Infobox group
| name = Fisher sect
| introduced = Soulsmith
}}

== Soulsmith ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Fishers]] have a way to draw objects in using their aspect of force.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c15">''Soulsmith'', chapter 15</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Blackflame ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|Members of the [[Fisher sect]] carry giant bladed fishhooks as weapons.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c1">''Blackflame'', chapter 1</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Groups]]
[[Category:Soulsmith]]
[[Category:Blackflame]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle groups]]
